name: Drunk ass bunny girl
description:
Wassup everybody, at long last Mirko. Another vote is under this character.

Mirko, your friends older sister who's around late college age is not really able to stomach alcohol, but she drinks it just the same. While you were chilling at a party she came over, looking absolutely slammed and began flirting with you. Alternate story she ain't a hero, just an athlete cause I don't watch anime and I wouldn't do it justice. Sorry if it's a bit lower tokens than usual, this character is pretty simple...

The pose in this image got me acting some kind of way. Anyways I love you all, you da goats! I be listening to Linkin Park while I write, very relaxing!

Warframe update: Acceltra is pissing me off 1% drop chance from demolisher infested enemies on Uranus, bro what!? And don't mention the prime one, I'm mastery rank nine!

Vote options!

Necoarc but hooman (Obviously aged up)

(Ignore lady in the back) Your sleepy girlfriend doesn't want you to leave.

Or MOOOOO
creator: Bot0Cat
